final:
module RefModule (
    input [7:0] temperature,
    output reg shutdown
);
  wire [7:0] _tap_temperature = temperature & {8{1'b1}};

    always @* begin
        if (temperature > 75) begin
            shutdown = 1'b1; // Shutdown
        end else begin
            shutdown = 1'b0; // No Shutdown
        end
    end
endmodule
